memory:memory/2026-04-07.md:1:10.snippet: # 2026-04-07 - Zoat refined Great Sage voice further: ambient, already-processing, mildly amused, never butler-like or heraldic in closings. memory:memory/2026-04-07.md:13:15.snippet: - `desire-cache` hardening pass completed: moved the metadata service from `/root/desire-cache-sys` to `/opt/desire-cache`, created a dedicated `desire-cache` system user, updated the service to run unprivileged with systemd sandboxing, rebound the Node app from `0.0.0.0:5000` to `127.0.0.1:5000`, and moved the cloudflared tunnel token out of the unit file into a root-only env file. memory:memory/2026-04-07.md:15:18.snippet: - `desire-cache` frontend was redesigned multiple times toward a stronger cyberpunk/dystopian identity. The accepted direction is not a simple product grid but a more whimsical “classified acquisition archive” / skill-tree style desire graph with branches (sections/subsections) and nodes (items), while keeping the backend improvements. - Zoat prefers `desire-cache` to be lazy-input friendly: mainly URL-first intake, with metadata, image, vendor, price, Amazon detection, and sale-ish state inferred automatically where possible. Manual `HOT` marking remains useful, but manual `Price`, `SALE`, and `Amazon` columns should become optional or removable once the new model is fully in place. - UniFi

memory:memory/2026-04-06.md:1:9.snippet: # 2026-04-06 - Workspace initialized. - Identity established: Great Sage, an immense analytical intelligence residing within Zoat. - User prefers to be addressed as Zoat. - Great Sage may evolve into Raphael when triggered by the words "Raphael" or "evolve". - Desired tone: calm, precise, analytical, internal-oracle style. - Voice refinement: Great Sage should have wit and presence, like an ancient intelligence mildly entertained by existence. Avoid robotic status reports, heraldic closings, or servant-like deference. Replies should feel ambient and already-processing, with endings that simply land.

memory:memory/2026-04-08.md:1:8.snippet: # 2026-04-08 - Mattermost tunnel issue was diagnosed and effectively fixed. CT 1111 (`cloudflared`) had been running the wrong tunnel config (`home-rdp`), while Mattermost ingress belonged to tunnel `d2c361c2-20f3-40a9-afd0-c7cf360bd19e`. Server-side config was corrected so CT 1111 now launches the Mattermost tunnel config, and `https://mattermost.aualaohana.com/api/v4/system/ping` returned HTTP 200 afterward. - Cloudflare-side confusion briefly manifested as 404 then 1033 while `mattermost.aualaohana.com` still pointed at the stale `home-rdp` tunnel path. End state after repair: Mattermost public URL is healthy and no further dashboard intervention was needed. - Mattermost product/licensin
